factions.name: Optimates
factions.description: Conservative senatorial aristocracy. Defenders of tradition and senatorial privilege.

factions.name: Populares
factions.description: Reform faction. Champions of the plebs and Italian allies.

factions.name: Italian Allies
factions.description: The Socii. Demand citizenship and equal rights after generations of military service.

factions.name: Sullan Faction
factions.description: Military hardliners gathering around Lucius Cornelius Sulla.

narrativeAnchors: Murder of Marcus Livius Drusus — the reformer whose assassination triggers the war
Italian cities revolt after citizenship is denied
Sulla's march on Rome — first time a Roman general turns legions against the city
